name: Dynex Capital Inc. 6.900% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Dynex Capital Inc. 6.900% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a type of preferred stock issued by Dynex Capital Inc., a mortgage real estate investment trust (REIT). The preferred stock pays a fixed dividend rate that may convert to a floating rate based on certain conditions. Dynex Capital focuses on investing in mortgage-backed securities.
